commentary_links.hebrew: וְנֶ֣פֶשׁ כִּֽי־תֶחֱטָ֗א וְשָֽׁמְעָה֙ ק֣וֹל אָלָ֔ה וְה֣וּא עֵ֔ד א֥וֹ רָאָ֖ה א֣וֹ יָדָ֑ע אִם־ל֥וֹא יַגִּ֖יד וְנָשָׂ֥א עֲוֺנֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english:
If a person incurs guilt—
When someone has heard a public imprecationaimprecation Namely, against one who withholds testimony. but (although able to testify as having seen or learned of the matter) has not given information and thus is subject to punishment;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star שאני התם דאמר קרא אם לא יגיד והאי

commentary_links.hebrew: שַׁבַּ֨ת שַׁבָּת֥וֹן הִיא֙ לָכֶ֔ם וְעִנִּיתֶ֖ם אֶת־נַפְשֹׁתֵיכֶ֑ם חֻקַּ֖ת עוֹלָֽם׃
commentary_links.english: It shall be a sabbath of complete rest for you, and you shall practice self-denial; it is a law for all time.

commentary_links.hebrew: חֻקַּ֤ת עוֹלָם֙ לְדֹרֹ֣תֵיכֶ֔ם בְּכֹ֖ל מוֹשְׁבֹֽתֵיכֶ֑ם כׇּל־חֵ֥לֶב וְכׇל־דָּ֖ם לֹ֥א תֹאכֵֽלוּ׃ {פ}
commentary_links.english: It is a law for all time throughout the ages, in all your settlements: you must not eat any fat or any blood.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אמר אסור מן התורה כיון דחזי לאיצטרופי

commentary_links.hebrew: דַּבֵּ֛ר אֶל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹ֑ר כׇּל־חֵ֜לֶב שׁ֥וֹר וְכֶ֛שֶׂב וָעֵ֖ז לֹ֥א תֹאכֵֽלוּ׃
commentary_links.english: Speak to the Israelite people thus: You shall eat no fatdfat I.e., hard, coarse fat (suet); cf. 3.3–5. of ox or sheep or goat.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: רבי יוחנן לריש לקיש אין לי אלא כל שישנו
